caption: Heatmap of Pearson correlations between the top-8 in-scope HY-IG derivatives (rows) and SPY forward returns at 6 horizons (1d, 5d, 21d, 63d, 126d, 252d). Derivatives ranked descending by |correlation| at the 63-day horizon; diverging RdBu_r palette centered at zero. Scope strictly constrained to signal_scope.json (HY-IG indicator-axis derivatives only).
row_selection_rule: top-8 by |Pearson r| at spy_fwd_63d, drawn from the in-scope pool (signal_scope.json indicator_axis.derivatives)
